specific_mechanism: ALPHA-STABLE-ATTN: per-layer characteristic-function MLE of attention-weight α index + γ-renormalization + per-head split
llm_application: Per attention layer, fit a heavy-tailed parametric distribution to the post-softmax attention weights; estimate one tail-heaviness parameter and one scale parameter; renormalize attention weights by the estimated scale before value-projection; allow per-head independent tail-heaviness parameters.
novelty_claim: Heavy-tailed attention bias (Powerformer Feb 2025) is fixed by inductive prior (smooth heavy-tailed decay); per-head α-stable PARAMETRIC FIT and renormalization adapt to actual data distribution rather than fixed prior.
